_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Create or customize existing Test and Evaluation Master Plans (TEMPs) for systems.
reference_document_element_description: Design and execute AI system test and evaluation programs, producing documented test plans, results, identified failure modes, and deployment recommendations.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RM domain. RM-T-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-S-004 (RM, cosine: 0.469), AI-T-006 (AI, cosine: 0.469).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.3/10 (raw 0.634). Shared vocabulary: [evaluation, plans, test]. DCWF-only terms [create, customize, existing, master, systems, temps] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, deployment, design, documented, execute, failure] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.881 (P=0.881, R=0.880). Balanced P/R — the 12-word DCWF element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Create or customize existing Test and Evaluation Master Plans (TEMPs) for system" and "Design and execute AI system test and evaluation programs, producing documented" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.510 < STS 0.634 (gap -0.124). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [create, customize, existing] and [ai, deployment, design] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 16.0%. Shared tokens: [evaluation, plans, test]. DCWF-only: [create, customize, existing, master, systems, temps]. WIDAI-only: [ai, deployment, design, documented, execute, failure].
